title: plectranthus shirensis
intro: Plectranthus shirensis, also known as blue spur flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Plectranthus shirensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to help lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
